response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale cloud infrastructure or distributed systems work, with most roles centered on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang — not C++ or cloud compute platforms — and no evidence of technical leadership in cloud engineering or mentoring cloud/DevOps teams as mandated.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across multiple languages and domains
Proven experience building open-source infrastructure and developer tooling
Active mentor and educator with workshops and community contributions
concerns: Only minimal C++ exposure (NI LabWindows) — far below 8-year requirement
No demonstrable experience with cloud compute platforms, distributed systems, or hardware architecture
Lacks any formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud or DevOps engineers
